subcodes.first_line: O eager seeker of the light of truth, behold how it hath revealed itself with such radiance that the sight is transformed into true insight, and illusion into manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق دیدار نور حقیقت چنان جلوه نموده که بصر عین بصیرت گشته و مجاز جلوه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
